data.content: Implemented lease audit totals and charts on branch feat/foolery-d8cb-audit-page. Summary and agent table now use completed claims (successes + failures), queue charts show per-day success rate percentages from completed outcomes only, and helper coverage now exercises mixed rates, missing completed days, and rounding. Validation: bun run lint (repo-wide warnings only, none from lease audit files), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
